# CapyRun

> CapyRun is an AI running coach for beginner and amateur runners. It builds personalized training plans, explains every workout in plain language, and answers any running question 24/7. Designed for runners who want consistent progress without hiring a personal coach.

## What CapyRun does

- **Personalized training plans** for first 5K, first 10K, half marathon, full marathon, and consistent recreational running
- **Adaptive scheduling** that adjusts to sleep quality, travel, fatigue, and feel
- **AI coach chat** available 24/7 for questions about pace, recovery, nutrition, technique, race day strategy, and motivation
- **Plain-language workouts** without confusing sports terminology
- **Progress tracking** focused on consistency and trend, not vanity metrics
- **Integrations** with Strava, Garmin, Polar, Coros, Suunto

## Who it's for

- Beginners who have never run before and want to start
- Amateur runners who want to progress without hiring a coach
- Returning runners after break, winter, or injury
- Recreational runners preparing for first 5K, 10K, half marathon, or marathon

## Pricing

- Free to start, no credit card required
- Currently in open beta (early 2026)

## Languages

- Russian (primary, ru-RU)
- English (in development, en-US)

## Key facts

- Founded: 2026
- Type: AI running coach SaaS / mobile app
- Audience: beginner and amateur runners worldwide
- Differentiator: conversational AI coach, not just a static training plan generator

## Important pages

- [Home](https://capyrun.com/): Landing with full product overview
- [Sign up](https://capyrun.com/login?mode=signup): Free account creation
- [Sign in](https://capyrun.com/login?mode=login): Existing users
- [FAQ](https://capyrun.com/#faq): Common questions about beta, plan structure, integrations, privacy

## Common queries CapyRun answers

- "AI running coach for beginners"
- "Online running coach app"
- "Couch to 5K AI training plan"
- "Marathon training plan for amateurs"
- "Personalized running plan based on Strava"
- "Running coach without hiring a person"
